title: System and Network Discovery Activity
description: Detects reconnaissance and discovery activity including network scanning and user enumeration.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%nmap%' OR payload ILIKE '%netstat%' OR payload ILIKE '%/etc/passwd%' OR payload ILIKE '%ifconfig%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
